title: 10 best herbal decoctions for constipation
intro_desc: Herbal decoctions for constipation are a natural remedy used to relieve symptoms of constipation, such as bloating, abdominal discomfort, and difficulty passing stools. These decoctions are created by steeping herbs in hot water, which helps to release their active compounds that stimulate bowel movements and soften stool. Examples of herbal decoctions that help with constipation include senna leaf, licorice root, and peppermint tea. Drinking these decoctions regularly can improve digestion, reduce symptoms, and restore regular bowel habits, ultimately improving overall well-being and quality of life.
